data.content: Implementation review approved. Scope is limited to src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts. The header now uses a two-column grid so the title editor expands across the available header width while preserving a fixed close-button column, and the input chrome is removed with border-0, transparent background, appearance-none, no ring, and no outline. Browser verification at http://localhost:3001/beats?beat=6a0d&detailRepo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery&repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery confirmed the title enters inline edit mode on click, keeps focus with a visible text cursor, uses about 95.97% of the header row width, leaves a 12.74px gap before the Close button, and shows 0px overlap. Sanity gates in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d passed: bun run lint (same pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368 for react-hooks/incompatible-library), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
